basic_details.job_title: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Dy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Dy Manager (Marketing) Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website www.bharattaxiapp.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Dy Manager (Marketing) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age as on 31-03-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing discipline as major subject. Minimum 8 years experience in marketing with at least 3 years in middle level position
qualification.details: Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing discipline as major subject. Minimum 8 years' experience in marketing, with at least 3 years in a middle level position having proven success in a two-sided marketplace or "platform business" with experience in managing marketing and regulatory landscapes, background in growth and performance marketing, brand and communications, customer acquisition, brand strategy and expansion. Additional certifications in Digital Marketing/Product Marketing/ Growth Marketing or Data Analytics and Experience in mobility sector is preferable.

salary_details.details: Approx Rs 14.50 LPA (HRA as per POP) Per Annum

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bharattaxiapp.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Dy Manager (Marketing) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications is 05-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Dy Manager (Marketing) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation with a full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA/Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing as the major subject.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Dy Manager (Marketing) post is 40 years, as of 31-03-2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Dy Manager (Marketing) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive an approximate salary of Rs. 14.50 LPA Per Annum, with HRA as per POP.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Dy Manager (Marketing) post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Dy Manager (Marketing) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely offline. Candidates need to download the form from the official website and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum work experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 8 years of experience in marketing is required, with at least 3 years in a middle-level position.

faq.question: Q9. Does the organization offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such provisions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sahakar Taxi Cooperative, which is www.bharattaxiapp.com.
